title: [Control Systems] Phoenix Contact Security Advisory (AV26-514)
description: On May 27, 2026, Phoenix Contact published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: AXC F  multiple models and versions prior to 2026.0.3
VL3 UPC 2440 EDGE  versions prior to 2026.0.3
VPLCNEXT CONTROL  multiple models and versions prior to 2026.0.3
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
